name: obsidian-sync
description: Sync coding session knowledge into an Obsidian vault and recall it later with local search.

interface.shortDescription: Turn coding sessions into structured Obsidian notes.
interface.longDescription: Capture session reports, learnings, follow-up tasks, and ideas in your Obsidian vault, then retrieve them later with qmd-powered local search.
defaultPrompt: Save this session to my Obsidian vault.
Recall what we learned about this pattern before.
Configure my Obsidian vault for session sync.
